First, let's consider the possible remainders when a number is divided by 16. The fourth powers modulo 16 are:
\[
0^4 \equiv 0 \pmod{16}, \quad 1^4 \equiv 1 \pmod{16}, \quad 2^4 \equiv 16 \equiv 0 \pmod{16}, \quad 3^4 \equiv 81 \equiv 1 \pmod{16},
